ddls:
CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to each claim */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the claim */,
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policyholder */,
  "business" TEXT /* Business name (if applicable) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location of the affected premises */,
  "claim_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim type */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim status */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was submitted */,
  "claim_amount" TEXT /* The amount claimed */,
  "approved_amount" TEXT /* The amount approved for payment */,
  "adjuster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claims adjuster assigned to the claim */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the claim */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the claim was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the claim was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policyholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("policyholder_id") REFERENCES policyholders ("policyholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_claim_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_type_id") REFERENCES claim_types ("claim_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_adjuster_id FOREIGN KEY ("adjuster_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES claim_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policyholders" (
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policyholder */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Surname of the policyholder */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the policyholder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the policyholder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the policyholder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the policyholder */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the policyholder */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* The policy number associated with the policyholder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the policyholder record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the policyholder record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policyholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code or postal code of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_types" (
  "claim_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim type */,
  "claim_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the claim type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the claim type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the claim type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the claim type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the claim status record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the claim status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim the document is attached to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., image, receipt) */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was created or uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the document record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the document record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_documents_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., claims adjuster, policyholder, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
